title: malache ovata
intro: Malache ovata, also known as Indian mulberry, is a plant species belonging to the family Flacourtiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malache ovata include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
